name: Kindergarten Fishing & Water Skills — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for casting motions without hooks, life-jacket awareness, and aquatic habitats. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with casting motions without hooks, life-jacket awareness, and aquatic habitats.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
